latestUpdate.en: 2026: Hermes Agent launched by Nous Research with multi-platform support and unified memory system
latestUpdate.zh: 2026年：Nous Research 发布 Hermes Agent，支持多平台与统一记忆系统

steps.title: Install Hermes Agent
steps.content: Download Hermes Desktop installer from the official website, or run: curl -fsSL https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.sh | bash (Linux/macOS) or iex (irm https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.ps1) (Windows PowerShell).

steps.title: Reload shell and start
steps.content: After installation, reload your shell (source ~/.bashrc) and run 'hermes' to start chatting.

steps.title: Configure LLM provider
steps.content: Run 'hermes model' to choose your LLM provider and model, or use 'hermes setup --portal' for the fastest setup with Nous Portal.

steps.title: Set up messaging platforms
steps.content: Run 'hermes gateway setup' to connect Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, or other platforms.

steps.title: Start using unified memory
steps.content: Hermes Agent now learns from every conversation, creates skills, and remembers you across all connected platforms.

steps.title: 安装 Hermes Agent
steps.content: 从官网下载 Hermes Desktop 安装程序，或运行：curl -fsSL https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.sh | bash（Linux/macOS）或 iex (irm https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/install.ps1)（Windows PowerShell）。

steps.title: 重新加载 shell 并启动
steps.content: 安装完成后，重新加载 shell（source ~/.bashrc）并运行 'hermes' 开始对话。

steps.title: 配置 LLM 提供商
steps.content: 运行 'hermes model' 选择 LLM 提供商和模型，或使用 'hermes setup --portal' 快速配置 Nous Portal。

steps.title: 设置消息平台
steps.content: 运行 'hermes gateway setup' 连接 Telegram、Discord、Slack、WhatsApp 等平台。

steps.title: 开始使用统一记忆
steps.content: Hermes Agent 现在会从每次对话中学习，创建技能，并在所有连接的平台上记住你。
